name: Divine Dragon Titanomakhia
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ティタノマキア
desc: This Special Summoned card cannot be destroyed by battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Divine Dragon Titanomakhia" once per turn. You can banish 3 "Divine Dragon Titanomakhia" from your GY and/or face-up field, including this card on the field; destroy all cards your opponent controls. During the End Phase: You can send cards from the top of your Deck to your GY, equal to the number of Dragon monsters you control.
mnst_eff: This Special Summoned card cannot be destroyed by battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Divine Dragon Titanomakhia" once per turn. You can banish 3 "Divine Dragon Titanomakhia" from your GY and/or face-up field, including this card on the field; destroy all cards your opponent controls. During the End Phase: You can send cards from the top of your Deck to your GY, equal to the number of Dragon monsters you control.
eff: This Special Summoned card cannot be destroyed by battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Divine Dragon Titanomakhia" once per turn. You can banish 3 "Divine Dragon Titanomakhia" from your GY and/or face-up field, including this card on the field; destroy all cards your opponent controls. During the End Phase: You can send cards from the top of your Deck to your GY, equal to the number of Dragon monsters you control.

action: Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself from field for cost
